member.office_address: 2465 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-0522

form_analysis.form_header_text: Rep. David G. Valadao FY2027 Appropriations Request Form
form_analysis.form_instructions_text: The deadline to submit FY27 appropriations requests is Friday, March 6 at 11:59 PM PT. Our office encourages entities to complete their requests as soon as possible. Submit one form for each request. For example, if you are requesting a funding increase with supportive report language, submit two separate requests. Please do not combine requests. My staff in Washington, D.C. are available to have a phone call or a meeting on any appropriations-related questions. Please call our office at (202) 225-4695 to be connected with the appropriate staffer for your issue area. NOTE: All Defense requests MUST be made in a separate form linked here.

sections.description: General contact information for the organization and primary point of contact.
Information for the organization's Washington, D.C. representative, if applicable.
Specify the subcommittee, agency, and account details for this appropriation request.

fields.label:
Select the Subcommittee of jurisdiction for this request.

NOTE: All Defense requests must be made in a separate form linked here.
fields.help_text: Select the relevant subcommittee for the request.
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development, and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education, and Related Agencies
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs, and Related Agencies
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs
Transportation, and Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: NASA's Science Mission Directorate is funded through the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies Subcommittee of Appropriations.

fields.label: Agency
fields.rationale: Directly matches the agency specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Agency Subdivision
fields.rationale: Uses the full name of the SMD as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Account
fields.rationale: Standard account name for NASA Science Mission Directorate funding.

fields.label: Program/Activity
fields.rationale: Standard program name for this programmatic funding request.

fields.label:
Please identify the type of request.

NOTE: Each request requires an individual form. If you have multiple requests, please fill out a separate form for each. This includes programmatic requests with language associated.
fields.help_text: Select whether this is for funding, report language, or bill language.
fields.rationale: This request is a programmatic funding ask for the NASA Science Mission Directorate account.

sections.description: Provide specific fiscal data and history for funding requests.

fields.label: Type of funding request for FY27
options: Support total funding level (enter amount in next question)
Support the President's FY2026 budget request
fields.draft_value: Support total funding level (enter amount in next question)
fields.rationale: The request is specifically for a $9 billion total funding level for the NASA Science Mission Directorate in FY2027.

fields.label: If entered "Support total funding level of" above, please enter the amount or write N/A.
fields.rationale: The exact total funding ask for the Science Mission Directorate provided in the reference values.

fields.label: Please provide the amount included for your request in the President's budget (if available). If unavailable, write N/A.
fields.help_text: Expected dollar figure from the President's FY26 budget request.
fields.rationale: Uses the FY2026 President's Budget Request amount from the authoritative funding history provided. The pre-filled annotation of $7.25B refers to the enacted level, but the field specifically asks for the budget request.

fields.label:
Please provide 4 years of funding history for this request. If this is a new request with no prior funding, please write N/A.

Use the following format:
FY26-$XX,000,000
FY25-$XX,000,000
FY24-$XX,000,000
FY23-$XX,000,000
fields.help_text: Provide historical appropriation dollar figures for the previous 4 fiscal years.
fields.draft_value:
FY26-$7,250,000,000
FY25-$7,334,000,000
FY24-[DATA NOT PROVIDED]
FY23-[DATA NOT PROVIDED]
fields.rationale: Historical data for FY26 and FY25 was provided in the context; however, FY24 and FY23 figures were not included in the provided spending history.

fields.label:
Please provide a justification for your funding request. Max 5-6 sentences. 

If you do not have a funding request, please write N/A.
fields.draft_value:
* Request of $9 billion restores NASA Science after significant cuts to maintain the peer-reviewed Decadal Survey mission schedule
* Sustained investment is vital to counter China's rapid expansion in lunar and Martian exploration capabilities
* NASA Science provides a 3:1 economic return, supporting over 4,000 civil servants and thousands of high-tech contractors
* Robust funding protects the U.S. leadership in planetary defense, climate monitoring, and deep-space discovery
fields.rationale: Justification uses the $9B ask and incorporates advocacy talking points regarding the space race with China, ROI, and workforce stability.

sections.description: Provide specific text for bill or report language requests.

fields.label: Bill/report language requested
fields.rationale: The request context explicitly states that no report or bill language is requested (N/A).

fields.label:
If this request received Congressional appropriation language in previous years, please list the fiscal year and provide the exact report or bill language as it appears in the most recent House, Senate, or Conference report.

If this is new language, please write N/A.
fields.rationale: No previous language was provided in the context, and the current request indicates no language is being submitted.

fields.label:
Please provide justification for your funding request. Max 5-6 sentences.

If you do not have a language request, please write N/A.
fields.rationale: This field is conditional on a language request, which is not being made for this programmatic funding ask.

sections.description: Contextual information regarding the priority and expected impact of the request.

fields.label: Of the requests made by this group in this bill, this request ranks as priority [X] out of [X] total requests.
fields.rationale: Priority ranking is a user-specific decision that depends on other requests being submitted by the individual.

fields.label: Are you making this request to other members of Congress? If yes, please list all members receiving this request. If no, please write N/A.
fields.draft_value:
* Representative Don Bacon (R-NE)
* Representative Judy Chu (D-CA)
fields.rationale: Reps. Bacon and Chu are listed as the leads for the multi-member letter in the House.

fields.label: Why is this request a good use of taxpayer dollars? Max. 5 sentences.
fields.draft_value:
* Returns approximately $3 to the domestic economy for every $1 invested through innovation and industrial demand
* Fulfills fundamental public responsibilities for national security and planetary defense that the private sector cannot replicate
* Utilizes nonpartisan, peer-reviewed Decadal Surveys to ensure funds target the highest-priority scientific breakthroughs
* Strengthens the STEM talent pipeline and workforce necessary for the broader U.S. aerospace and technology economy
fields.rationale: Uses economic and strategic talking points from the provided context to justify taxpayer expenditure.

fields.label: If this project has a direct impact on CA-22, please provide that information here. If not, please write N/A.
fields.help_text: Describe the local impact on California's 22nd District.
fields.rationale: The local spending data confirms $0.00 in NASA Science obligations in CA-22 across FY2023-FY2025.

sections.description: Sample letter text for the request.

fields.label:
Please draft letter language for your request using the following format (max. 3 sentences).

Ex: Community Development Block Grants. Support the president's budget request for the Housing and Urban Development (HUD) Community Development Block Grants (CDBG). The Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) program provides flexible funding to communities to give them the resources to address a wide range of unique community development needs. Robust funding for the CDBG program is essential not only to helping individual communities, but also to strengthening our nation's economy and leveraging local investment in community development.
fields.draft_value: Science Mission Directorate. Support $9 billion for NASA's Science Mission Directorate to restore funding levels necessary for international leadership and workforce stability. This funding ensures progress on decadal priorities that maintain the U.S. edge in the global space race against competitors like China. NASA Science provides a critical return on investment, strengthening the national innovation economy and the next generation of STEM professionals.
fields.rationale: Drafted to follow the requested format while emphasizing leadership, competition, and economic impact within the three-sentence limit.
